From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Slovenia](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Slovenia "wiktionary:Slovenia")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[Slovenia](/wiki/Slovenia "Slovenia")** is a country in southeastern Europe.

**Slovenia**  may also refer to:

## Places

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Slovenia_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Places")]

* [Slovenia (European Parliament constituency)](/wiki/Slovenia_(European_Parliament_constituency) "Slovenia (European Parliament constituency)"), covering Slovenia
* [Socialist Republic of Slovenia](/wiki/Socialist_Republic_of_Slovenia "Socialist Republic of Slovenia"), a federal unit of former Yugoslavia
* [Eastern Slovenia](/wiki/Eastern_Slovenia "Eastern Slovenia"), one of the two statistical regions of Slovenia
* [Western Slovenia](/wiki/Western_Slovenia "Western Slovenia"), the other of two statistical regions of Slovenia
* [Friulian Slovenia](/wiki/Friulian_Slovenia "Friulian Slovenia"), a region in Italy and Slovenia

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Slovenia_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [United Slovenia](/wiki/United_Slovenia "United Slovenia"), projected (1848) political entity

* [Slavia (disambiguation)](/wiki/Slavia_(disambiguation) "Slavia (disambiguation)")
